description_long: This doll features a stylized humanoid form with a large, rounded head and a small body, standing on a square pink base. The head is adorned with spiky, bright pink hair that radiates outward, and the face is simple with two round eyes and no visible mouth. A striking red flame-like pattern is painted on the forehead, adding a dynamic visual element. The doll wears a red and white outfit with short sleeves, black shoulder pads, and white pants, accented by bold, graphic designs on the chest and sleeves. The arms are short and cylindrical, and the legs are stubby, giving the figure a playful, chibi-like appearance. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, suggesting a plastic or vinyl construction.
description: A stylized doll with spiky pink hair, a red flame forehead design, and a red-and-white outfit, standing on a pink base. The figure has a smooth, glossy finish and a playful, chibi-like appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the spiky pink hair extending backward and the red-and-white sleeve detail on the arm.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flame pattern on the forehead, round eyes, and the full red-and-white outfit with black shoulder pads.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the hair spikes and the graphic design on the sleeve.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the spiky hair, the red jacket with white patterns, and the pink base.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a short-sleeved, red and white outfit with graphic flame motifs, black shoulder pads, and white pants, reminiscent of anime or superhero costume styles.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms relaxed at its sides and legs straight, head facing forward in a neutral, static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: The face is neutral with round, open eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving an expressionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, spiky bright pink hair radiating outward from the scalp in stylized, pointed tufts.
